name: ResearchGate Academia Full Text  Author

meta.description: Search for papers, request full-text, or find author profiles on ResearchGate and Academia.edu. Note: Full-text often requires manual request/login — this tool helps locate links/profiles

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Search papers/authors on ResearchGate or Academia.edu.
Returns profile/paper links — full-text may require login/request.
platform: "researchgate" or "academia"
action: "search", "paper", "author"
